visuals.title: MPI_Bcast Operation
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.5s" begin="0.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Collective Communication
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Central Node -->
  <circle cx="210" cy="175" r="25" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <text x="210" y="180" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Root
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Worker Nodes -->
  <circle cx="120" cy="100" r="20" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <text x="120" y="105" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Node 1
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <circle cx="300" cy="100" r="20" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <text x="300" y="105" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Node 2
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <circle cx="120" cy="250" r="20" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <text x="120" y="255" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Node 3
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <circle cx="300" cy="250" r="20" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <text x="300" y="255" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Node 4
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Communication Arrows -->
  <line x1="210" y1="150" x2="130" y2="110" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <line x1="210" y1="150" x2="290" y2="110" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <line x1="210" y1="200" x2="130" y2="240" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <line x1="210" y1="200" x2="290" y2="240" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>

  <!-- Data Flow Indicators -->
  <circle cx="170" cy="130" r="5" fill="#64B5F6" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <circle cx="250" cy="130" r="5" fill="#64B5F6" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <circle cx="170" cy="220" r="5" fill="#64B5F6" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <circle cx="250" cy="220" r="5" fill="#64B5F6" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>

  <!-- Legend Box -->
  <rect x="20" y="300" width="380" height="40" fill="#E3F2FD" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="1" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="315" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" font-weight="bold" opacity="0">
    Broadcast (One-to-All) / Gather (All-to-One)
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="210" y="330" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Central node coordinates communication with all worker nodes
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
</svg>
